name: Chicken with Raspberry Vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Bone and skin the chicken breasts.
2. Lay them flat and slice each into two filets parallel to the board.
3. Sprinkle salt and pepper on both sides of the filets.
4. Heat oil and butter in a saucepan.
5. Saute the chicken filets for a few minutes on each side until they turn opaque.
6. Set aside and keep the chicken warm.
7. In the same pan, saute shallots for a few seconds.
8. Add raspberry vinegar and 4-6 tablespoons of water to the pan.
9. Stir well to loosen any cooking residue.
10. Cook for one minute, then return the chicken filets to the pan.
11. Continue cooking until the chicken is done (another few minutes), turning once.
12. Serve immediately with the sauce.
